# Siliqua Pro

## All-in-One AirPods Pro Customization

Siliqua Pro is an all-in-one customization tweak for your AirPods Pro.

## Features

### Customisable Actions

Customize actions for single, double, triple, or quadruple presses:

- Play / Pause
- Skip
- Rewind
- Skip 15s
- Rewind 15s
- Toggle Repeat
- Toggle Shuffle
- Increase Volume
- Decrease Volume
- Toggle Siri
- Cycle listening modes

### Listening Mode Control

Control listening modes in the audio module with two layout modes:

- **Trio-mode:** One button for each - Off, Noise Cancellation, and Transparency mode
- **Single-mode:** Cycle through listening modes with a single button

### Additional Features

- Route name in audio module
- AirPods icon in volume slider when AirPods Pro are playing media
- CC Module to cycle through AirPods listening modes (Off, Noise Cancellation, Transparency)

## Compatibility

- iOS 12 and iOS 11
- AirPods Pro required for full functionality
